chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-696 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 30.12.2024 Ms. Sabahat Memon, Advocate along-with applicant. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along-with Inspector Aamir Hussain Shah on behalf of SSP Jamshoro and Inspector / SHO Arslan Ahmed SHO PS Kotri. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. Mr. Kashif Hussain Dawach, advocate files power on behalf of respondents No.3 to 5 taken on record. == I have heard the parties as well as their counsel. SHO PS Kotri is present and states that he will hear both the parties and shall act in accordance with law. Counsel for the parties are satisfied with the statement of said SHO, as such, seek disposal of the matter. Accordingly, instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is disposed of in above terms. Since the respondents have been served, as such, show-cause notice issued to SHO PS Kotri vide order dated 19.12.2024 is hereby vacated. JUDGE Muhammad Danish
